name: council-for-slack
description: MCP server wrapping council-diff (npm: council-diff) as a single tool. Fires a 5-persona AI council on a decision and returns structured verdicts with agreement score, per-voice rationale, and a synthesized consensus. Built on council-diff v0.6 — supports Anthropic Sonnet 4.6 by default with optional OpenAI / GLM fallback via the llm-adapter abstraction (council-diff#1).

tools.name: council_deliberate
tools.description: Fire a 5-persona AI council on a high-stakes decision. Returns a GO / WAIT / KILL / SPLIT recommendation, agreement score, and per-voice verdicts with strongest signal and biggest gap. Built on council-diff v0.6 (Anthropic Sonnet 4.6, ~10s, ~$0.03). Use when the question has real downside, ambiguity, or smart-money disagreement — not for trivial choices.

domain.description: Persona roster. founder = YC Partner / VC Skeptic / Lawyer / Indie CFO / Pragmatic Spouse. engineer = Rust Maintainer / SRE Oncall / Recruiter / Junior Dev / CTO 5y Later. investor = Macro / Sector / PM / Growth VC / Activist Short. career = Mentor 20y / Recruiter / Peer / CSO / Future You. product = Real User / Competitor / Internal Dev / Garry-style / Naval-style. quant = Jane Street MD / Citadel / Two Sigma ML / Anthropic / HFT Engineer.

decision.description: The question. Phrase as a binary or short-list, not open-ended.

context.description: Ground truth the personas need to score honestly. Numbers, dates, constraints. Without context the personas correctly punish the question with low scores.

oracle.description: DO NOT SET BY DEFAULT. Fable 5 access is currently restricted by Anthropic. Only set when the user has explicitly asked for an Oracle / Fable 5 / tiebreak and you have evidence the entitlement is active.

safeMode.description: Force zero-retention path. When true, oracle silently downgrades to Sonnet 4.6 fallback. Use for privacy-sensitive decisions (legal, M&A, personnel).
